name: kivibros.com
message: Kivi Bros. Trucking of Duluth, MN, is an experienced leader in the transportation industry and offers trucking logistics, heavy hauling, step decks, conestogas, and flatbed trailers. We serve the U.S. Nationwide including Alaska and Canada. Along with our Headquarters in Duluth, MN. We also have a terminal in Blaine, MN. and Harrodsburg, KY. Just outside of Lexington, KY.SITE: www.kivibros.com Address : 5739 OLD HWY. 61, DULUTH, MN 55810ALL DATA SIZE: 111gb 1. Human Resources 2. Payroll 3. Accounting and etc…
